skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem: A rope with a length of 132 inches is cut into two parts. One part has a length of a inches, and the other part has a length of b inches. The value of a is 12 more than 5 times the value of b. What is the value of a?
rationale: From a = 5b + 12 and a + b = 132: substituting gives 5b + 12 + b = 132, so 6b = 120 and b = 20. Then a = 5(20) + 12 = 112. The correct answer is choice C.
